name: #13: "Scrubs to scripts" by Diana Silva and "I spared no expense" by Ana Rodrigues
description: Two Portuguese devs take the stage! Diana Silva on her journey from healthcare worker to software developer, and Ana Rodrigues on her tiny corner of the web where she celebrates passion projects built for joy, not for money.
location: Vulcan Works, 34-38 Guildhall Rd, Northampton, NN1 1EW
parking: St. John's Multi Storey Car Park

schedule.title: "Scrubs to scripts" by Diana Silva
schedule.description: What happens when a healthcare worker accidentally falls down the coding rabbit hole? An interactive talk about changing careers at 25, learning to code, surviving imposter syndrome, and why saying "yes" to CS50 changed my life.

schedule.title: "I spared no expense" by Ana Rodrigues
schedule.description: A talk about the projects I built for my own tiny corner of the web that I did not need, that nobody asked for, and that I built anyway despite my bank account telling me not to. Some of them still work. All of them have a story. No expense was spared.
